category_sources: Official GitHub README describes STK as C++ audio signal processing and algorithmic synthesis classes.
source_facts.description says stk is the Sound Synthesis Toolkit.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses The Synthesis ToolKit in C++ (STK).
source_facts.description expands STK as Sound Synthesis Toolkit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README directs users to the CCRMA STK site for complete documentation.
Official GitHub README is the source repository documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official STK GitHub repository links to ccrma.stanford.edu/software/stk and describes The Synthesis ToolKit in C++.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes open-source audio signal processing and algorithmic synthesis C++ classes.
